title: Pmartinez
compiled_truth: Pmartinez is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (2000-11-29 to 2001-10-17), Pmartinez sent 7 and received 21 emails, totalling 28 interactions. Top correspondents: [Genova Diane](people/genova-diane-jpmorgan) (7), [Rainslie](people/rainslie-isda) (7), [Smarra](people/smarra-isda) (5), [Haedicke Mark](people/haedicke-mark) (5), [Ksumme](people/ksumme-isda) (4).
